name: NVIDIA
key_advantage: Dominant CUDA ecosystem, high-speed NVLink interconnect, complete AI stack

name: AMD
key_advantage: CDNA chiplet architecture, high-capacity HBM3e, ROCm open software stack

name: Intel
key_advantage: Gaudi dedicated ASIC architecture, built-in Ethernet, cost-effective scaling

name: Google
key_advantage: TPU architecture, JAX/XLA vertical integration, ultra-scale optical switching

name: Amazon (AWS)
key_advantage: Trainium/Inferentia optimized for AWS cloud, Neuron SDK, Nitro integration

name: Microsoft
key_advantage: Azure Maia optimized for Copilot and Azure OpenAI inference, deep software integration

name: Meta
key_advantage: MTIA optimized for recommendation workloads, PyTorch integration, low TDP

name: Tesla
key_advantage: Dojo for FSD training, AI5 edge chip for vehicles & humanoid robotics, high efficiency

name: Groq
key_advantage: LPU deterministic SRAM architecture, extremely low latency, compiled compiler-scheduled execution

name: Cerebras
key_advantage: Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE), massive on-chip SRAM capacity and bandwidth, CS-3 system simplicity

name: Huawei (华为)
key_advantage: Da Vinci architecture, CANN software stack, strong Chinese domestic cloud market share

name: Cambricon (寒武纪)
key_advantage: MLU-Link interconnect, NeuWare software toolchain, domestic server deployments

name: Biren (壁仞科技)
key_advantage: Bi Liren chiplet architecture, high FP32 vector compute, domestic enterprise market

name: Muxi (沐曦集成电路)
key_advantage: MetaX architecture, CUDA compatibility, MXN/MXC dual-track for inference & training
